home.faq_subtitle: Everything you need to know about Savour

faq_items.a: Most orders arrive within 15-35 minutes. Our AI optimizes routes in real-time to ensure the fastest possible delivery.
We accept cash, all major credit/debit cards, and popular e-wallets including Apple Pay, Google Pay, and PayPal.

faq_items.q: Can I track my order in real-time?
faq_items.a: Yes! Once your order is placed, you can track the preparation status and your driver's live location on the map.

faq_items.q: How do I become a restaurant partner?
faq_items.a: Sign up through our Partner portal. We'll review your application within 24 hours and get you set up with full onboarding support.

faq_items.q: Is there a minimum order amount?
faq_items.a: Minimum order amounts vary by restaurant, typically starting at $5. No minimums for platform fees.

faq_items.q: How does the rewards program work?
faq_items.a: Earn Savour Points on every order. Reach milestones to unlock badges, exclusive discounts, and priority delivery.
